title: rosa rubiginosa subvar. eriocalyx
intro: Rosa rubiginosa subvar. eriocalyx, also known as dwarf sweet briar, is a subvariant of the Rosa rubiginosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Rosa rubiginosa subvar. eriocalyx include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rosa rubiginosa subvar. eriocalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
